connectorUiConfig.title: UpCloud Audit Logs
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown:
The UpCloud connector ingests audit log events from UpCloud into Microsoft Sentinel, providing visibility into API activity, user actions, and administrative changes across your UpCloud environment.

Supports API Key authentication.

For more information, visit [UpCloud API Docs](https://developers.upcloud.com/1.3/22-audit-logs/).

graphQueries.baseQuery: {{graphQueriesTableName}} | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: read and write permissions are required.

customs.name: UpCloud API Key
customs.description: A UpCloud API Key is required. [See documentation](https://developers.upcloud.com/1.3/24-api-tokens/)

sampleQueries.description: All audit log events from the last 24 hours

sampleQueries.query: {{graphQueriesTableName}} | summarize count() by Action | order by count_ desc

sampleQueries.description: Login and logout events by user
sampleQueries.query: {{graphQueriesTableName}} | where Action in ('login', 'logout') | summarize count() by AccountUsername, Action | order by count_ desc

sampleQueries.description: Events by resource type and origin
sampleQueries.query: {{graphQueriesTableName}} | summarize count() by ResourceType, Origin | order by count_ desc

sampleQueries.description: Delete actions with source IP details
sampleQueries.query: {{graphQueriesTableName}} | where Action == 'delete' | project TimeGenerated, AccountUsername, ResourceType, UpCloudResourceId, IpAddress

instructionSteps.title: Step 1 - Obtain your UpCloud API Token
instructionSteps.description: Log in to your UpCloud account and generate an API token. Refer to the [UpCloud API Tokens documentation](https://developers.upcloud.com/1.3/24-api-tokens/) for instructions on creating a token with the required permissions to access audit logs.

instructionSteps.title: Step 2 - Enter your API Key
instructionSteps.description: Provide your UpCloud API token below to connect.
